parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'NDAA defense authorization budget appropriations FY2026 FY2027', search_mode: 'semantic', per_page: 15, fields_to_return: ['govtribe_id','name','govtribe_url','content_snippet','posted_date','govtribe_ai_summary'] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a defense contracting analyst for Georgetown Defense Analytics (GDA). GDA targets: SOCOM, TRADOC, INSCOM, CYBERCOM, DISA, INDOPACOM, MDA, FAA. Core NAICS: 541330, 541511, 541512, 541519, 541611, 541715, 611430. Services: SETA, systems engineering, cybersecurity, IT modernization, training/simulation, AI/ML, cloud.

Analyze these NDAA/defense authorization updates and identify specific provisions that affect GDA opportunities:

' + $json.context + '

Respond in JSON format: {"provisions": [{"title": "...", "section": "...", "impact": "...", "affected_agencies": ["..."], "affected_naics": ["..."], "opportunity_signal": "positive|negative|neutral", "recommended_action": "..."}]}' }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ command: 'docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -c "' + ($json.sql || 'SELECT 1').replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"' }) }}
